test_cases.scenario: Scenario 1: Mobile opens MarkdownEditor -> preview tab is initially selected
test_cases.evidence: useEffect at lines 153-157 sets mobileTab to 'preview' when isMobile is true. Unit test 'should default to preview tab on mobile' confirms the preview tab has the active CSS class.

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 2: PC opens MarkdownEditor -> editor is initially selected (existing behavior maintained)
test_cases.evidence: Unit test 'should keep editor as default tab on PC' confirms mobile tabs are not shown and the textarea is present. Desktop MarkdownEditor in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx (line 1597-1603) has no initialViewMode prop, preserving existing behavior.

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 3: Mobile with localStorage set to editor -> preview is still initially selected
test_cases.evidence: Unit test 'should default to preview tab on mobile even when localStorage viewMode is editor' confirms that localStorage does not override the mobile default preview tab.

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 4: Mobile preview->editor tab switching remains functional
test_cases.evidence: Unit test 'should not reset mobileTab when filePath changes' clicks the editor tab and verifies it becomes active, confirming tab switching works.

test_cases.scenario: Scenario 5: filePath change does not reset user's tab selection
test_cases.evidence: Unit test 'should not reset mobileTab when filePath changes' switches to editor tab, rerenders with a different filePath, and confirms editor tab remains active. The useEffect dependency array is [isMobile] only, not including filePath.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Mobile (under 768px) MarkdownEditor defaults to Preview tab
Mobile editor tab switching still works
PC/Desktop MarkdownEditor behavior is not affected
Mobile initial display is not affected by localStorage viewMode setting
MARP file display flow is not affected
WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx mobile Modal MarkdownEditor also defaults to Preview tab

verification_details.typescript_check: npx tsc --noEmit passed with no errors
verification_details.eslint_check: npm run lint passed with no warnings or errors
verification_details.unit_tests: 276 test files passed, 5421 tests passed. 1 pre-existing failure in git-utils.test.ts (unrelated to Issue #549). New test file MarkdownEditor-mobile-default.test.tsx: all 4 tests passed.

code_review.useEffect_placement: Lines 153-157 in MarkdownEditor.tsx, immediately after mobileTab state declaration (line 134)
code_review.mobile_initialViewMode: initialViewMode='split' added at line 1875 in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx (mobile Modal)
code_review.desktop_unchanged: Desktop MarkdownEditor at line 1597-1603 has no initialViewMode prop

message: All acceptance criteria are satisfied. The implementation correctly defaults the mobile MarkdownEditor to the preview tab via a useEffect with [isMobile] dependency, without affecting desktop behavior or being overridden by localStorage settings.
